name: lean-cross-check
description: Verify that the Rust IR types match the Lean formal specification. Use after any change to Op enum or IR data structures.
steps: 1. Read ir-spec/PrismaIR/Syntax.lean — extract all Op constructors and field types
2. Compare against shell/prisma-ir/src/lib.rs — check every variant exists
3. Verify field types match (Nat → u32, Bool → bool, Option → Option, List → Vec)
4. Check that serde derives exist (required for binary serialization)
5. Report discrepancies in docs/REVIEWS/ with exact line numbers
